name: grani-tag-engine-workspace
description: Workspace for the grani-tag-engine library and related tools

scripts.build: npm run build -w grani-tag-engine && npm run build -w @grani/schema-tools && npm run build -w @grani/schema-editor
scripts.test: npm run test -w grani-tag-engine && npm run test -w @grani/schema-tools
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w grani-tag-engine && npm run lint -w @grani/schema-tools && npm run lint -w @grani/schema-editor
